name: Linda's Olive Oil and Sauternes Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon finely grated orange peel (plus 2 tablespoons extra)
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter and flour a 20cm springform pan and line it with baking paper.
2. Beat the egg yolks with half the sugar until they are pale and thick.
3. Add the orange peel, olive oil, and Sauternes to the yolk mixture.
4. Combine the flour and salt in a separate bowl.
5. Beat the egg whites with cream of tartar until stiff peaks form.
6. Gradually add the remaining sugar to the egg white mixture until stiff peaks are formed.
7. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the yolk mixture until well combined.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake at 180°C for 20 minutes, turning the cake if necessary for even baking.
9. Reduce the oven temperature to 150°C and continue baking for another 20 minutes.
10. Turn off the oven, cover the top of the cake with a round of buttered baking paper, and let it cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 more minutes.
11. Remove the cake from the oven and dust with icing sugar.
12. Serve with mango cheeks and burnt sugar sauce (optional).
